positive: A vibrant, highly stylized symmetrical mandala design centered on a glowing bioluminescent nebula and intertwined forest roots. The scene features celestial elements like crescent moons and shooting stars mixed with stylized flora (ferns, leaves, mandalas of flowers). Use a deep midnight blue and rich emerald green color palette with glowing gold and cyan accents. The composition must be perfectly circular and centralized, suitable for an apparel print. Strong linework, high contrast, clean silhouettes, cosmic geometric abstraction, intricate details, vector art aesthetic, sticker design, isolated on a clean white background.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, messy, bad composition, jpeg compression, low resolution, noise, extra limbs, bad anatomy, gradient fill, photorealistic, messy lines
